name: @chio-protocol/guard-ts
description: TypeScript SDK for writing Chio guard components compiled to WASM

scripts.build:example: npm run generate-types && esbuild examples/tool-gate/guard.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/tool-gate.js && jco componentize dist/tool-gate.js --wit ../../../wit/chio-guard --world-name guard --out dist/tool-gate.wasm --disable all
